data.title: dso:sprint Skill tool invocation falls back to manual SKILL.md read instead of auto-executing skill
data.description: When the user invokes /dso:sprint via the Skill tool, the skill system returns 'Launching skill: dso:sprint' but does not automatically load and execute the SKILL.md content. The orchestrator then falls back to manually reading plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md using the Read tool, which is a workaround rather than the intended session-start auto-load behavior. The Skill tool should deliver the skill content directly so the orchestrator can follow it without a separate Read call.
